name: brainstorm.closeSession
description: Export the brainstorm board and close the associated whiteboard room when the session is complete.

room_id.description: Whiteboard room ID to export and close.

project_id.description: Project ID for scoping (optional, uses session).

org_id.description: Organization ID for scoping (optional, uses session).

snapshot_id.description: ID of the persisted snapshot saved to the archive.
